nasb.text: When they heard that He was alive and had been seen by her, they refused to believe it.

esv.text: But when they heard that he was alive and had been seen by her, they would not believe it.

cnv.text: 他們聽見耶穌活了，又被馬利亞看見了，卻不相信。

ccb.text: 就告诉他们耶稣已经复活了，还向她显现过，但他们不相信。

csbs.text: 他们听见耶稣活了，又被玛丽亚看到了，却是不相信。
